title: ageratinastrum goetzeanum
intro: Ageratinastrum goetzeanum, also known as the Goetze's ageratinastrum, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly referred to as the mint or deadnettle family. The medicinal properties of Ageratinastrum goetzeanum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to combat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Ageratinastrum goetzeanum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
